arg.name: robot_model
arg.description: Robot model to bring up on hardware. Choices are: [allie, cornelius, joe].

arg.name: runtime_config_package
arg.description: Package with the controller configuration in the config folder.

arg.name: description_package
arg.description: Description package with shared robot URDF/xacro files.

arg.name: controllers_file
arg.description: Optional YAML file (without extension) with the controller configuration override.

arg.name: prefix
arg.description: Prefix of the joint names, useful for multi-robot setups.

arg.name: robot_controller
arg.description: Robot controller to start. Choices are: [diff_drive_controller].

arg.name: rviz
arg.description: Launch RViz alongside the selected robot bringup.

arg.name: use_lidar
arg.description: Start the robot lidar driver stack as part of hardware bringup.

arg.name: use_realsense
arg.description: Start the Intel RealSense D455 driver as part of hardware bringup.

arg.name: use_gps
arg.description: Start the u-blox ZED-F9P GPS driver as part of hardware bringup.

arg.name: use_memsense
arg.description: Start the Memsense MS-IMU3025 driver as part of hardware bringup.

arg.name: ouster_namespace
arg.description: Namespace used by the Ouster ROS 2 driver.

arg.name: ouster_sensor_hostname
arg.description: Sensor hostname or IP for the Ouster OS0-128.

arg.name: ouster_udp_dest
arg.description: Destination IP for Ouster UDP packets.

arg.name: ouster_lidar_mode
arg.description: Initial lidar mode for the Ouster OS0-128.

arg.name: velodyne_namespace
arg.description: Namespace used by the Velodyne ROS 2 driver stack.

arg.name: velodyne_device_ip
arg.description: Optional device IP used to filter Velodyne packets from the VLP-16.

arg.name: velodyne_port
arg.description: UDP data port used by the Velodyne VLP-16.

arg.name: velodyne_rpm
arg.description: Spin rate used by the Velodyne VLP-16.

arg.name: realsense_namespace
arg.description: Namespace used by the RealSense ROS 2 driver.

arg.name: realsense_camera_name
arg.description: Node name used by the RealSense ROS 2 driver.

arg.name: realsense_serial_no
arg.description: Optional RealSense serial number used to select the D455 device.

arg.name: gps_node_name
arg.description: Node name used by the u-blox GPS driver.

arg.name: gps_device
arg.description: Serial device used by the u-blox ZED-F9P receiver.

arg.name: gps_frame_id
arg.description: Frame id published by the GPS driver.

arg.name: gps_config_file
arg.description: Optional YAML configuration file override for the u-blox GPS driver.

arg.name: memsense_node_name
arg.description: Node name used by the Memsense MS-IMU3025 driver.

arg.name: memsense_device
arg.description: Serial device used by the Memsense MS-IMU3025 receiver.

arg.name: memsense_frame_id
arg.description: Frame id published by the Memsense MS-IMU3025 driver.

arg.name: pwm_topic
arg.description: Combined PWM output topic from the hardware interface.

arg.name: pwm_front_left_topic
arg.description: Front-left motor PWM output topic from the hardware interface.

arg.name: pwm_rear_left_topic
arg.description: Rear-left motor PWM output topic from the hardware interface.

arg.name: pwm_front_right_topic
arg.description: Front-right motor PWM output topic from the hardware interface.

arg.name: pwm_rear_right_topic
arg.description: Rear-right motor PWM output topic from the hardware interface.

arg.name: pwm_min
arg.description: Minimum RC PWM command in microseconds.

arg.name: pwm_neutral
arg.description: Neutral RC PWM command in microseconds.

arg.name: pwm_max
arg.description: Maximum RC PWM command in microseconds.

arg.name: pwm_wheel_radius
arg.description: Wheel radius used to convert joint velocity commands into wheel surface speed.

arg.name: pwm_max_wheel_speed
arg.description: Wheel speed that maps to full-scale PWM.

arg.name: pwm_invert_left
arg.description: Invert the left PWM output sign.

arg.name: pwm_invert_right
arg.description: Invert the right PWM output sign.

arg.name: roboclaw_use_encoder
arg.description: Use Roboclaw encoder feedback for Cornelius hardware bringup.

arg.name: roboclaw_device
arg.description: Serial device used by the Roboclaw controller.

arg.name: roboclaw_baud
arg.description: Serial baud rate used by the Roboclaw controller.

arg.name: roboclaw_address
arg.description: Packet serial address used by the Roboclaw controller.

arg.name: roboclaw_max_speed
arg.description: Maximum track speed in m/s used for command saturation.

arg.name: roboclaw_ticks_at_max_speed
arg.description: Full-scale duty command used by the Roboclaw no-encoder mode.

arg.name: roboclaw_acceleration
arg.description: Acceleration value used for Roboclaw duty commands.

arg.name: roboclaw_ticks_per_meter
arg.description: Encoder ticks per meter for the Roboclaw encoder mode.

arg.name: roboclaw_m1_invert
arg.description: Invert the M1 motor direction in software.

arg.name: roboclaw_m2_invert
arg.description: Invert the M2 motor direction in software.

arg.name: roboclaw_m1_encoder_sign
arg.description: Sign correction applied to the Roboclaw M1 encoder ticks.

arg.name: roboclaw_m2_encoder_sign
arg.description: Sign correction applied to the Roboclaw M2 encoder ticks.

arg.name: roboclaw_wheel_radius
arg.description: Track drive wheel radius used to convert Cornelius joint velocity commands.

arg.name: python_executable
arg.description: Python executable used by the robot backend helper processes.

arg.name: odrive_front_serial_number
arg.description: USB serial number of the front ODrive v3.6 board.

arg.name: odrive_rear_serial_number
arg.description: USB serial number of the rear ODrive v3.6 board.

arg.name: odrive_front_right_axis
arg.description: Axis index on the front ODrive that corresponds to the right wheel motor.

arg.name: odrive_rear_right_axis
arg.description: Axis index on the rear ODrive that corresponds to the right wheel motor.

arg.name: odrive_connect_timeout
arg.description: Timeout in seconds used when connecting to the front and rear ODrive boards.

let.name: selected_gps_config_file
let.value: $(eval '\'$(var gps_config_file)\' if \'$(var gps_config_file)\' != \'\' else \'allie_ublox\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'allie\' else \'cornelius_ublox\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'cornelius\' else \'joe_ublox\'')
